zh.lifeSummary: 當William Canon於1515年出生在英國戴文希德姆斯時，他的父親Thomas Channon30歲，母親Blanch Johns30歲。他於1529年與Florence Alice Anslow在英國戴文希德波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1567年4月3日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國戴文希德姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Canon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish (Donegal), and Scottish (Dunbartonshire): variant of   Cannon  .
French: topographic name from (Old) French canon ‘tube, pipe, channel (for water flow)’. Compare Cannon .
Americanized form of Assyrian/Chaldean Kanon and perhaps also of any of its variants such as Kanoun.

variants.name: Cannon
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Canann or Ó Canáin ‘descendant of Cano or Canán’. Occasionally, and in the Isle of Man, the surname derives from Mac Canann ‘son of Cano or Canán’, which in Ireland was Anglicized McCann or McConnon . See also Connon . The personal name is from Gaelic cano ‘wolf cub’, of which Canán is a diminutive. In Ulster Cannon may also be shortened from Ó Canannáin ‘descendant of Canannán’, a pet form (double diminutive) of the personal name. This was a cheiftan family in Donegal, and the name was particularly common there.

English: from Middle English canun ‘canon’ (Old Norman French canonie, canoine, from Late Latin canonicus). In medieval England this term denoted a clergyman living with others in a clergy house; the surname is mostly an occupational name for a servant in a house of canons, although it could also be a nickname or even a patronymic.

variants.name: Kanon
meanings: Assyrian/Chaldean: from a variant of the personal name Kānūn, from the Syriac name of the ninth and tenth months of the Assyrian calendar. Compare Canon 3.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Canon was born in 1515, in Sidmouth, Devon, England, his father, Thomas Channon, was 30 and his mother, Blanch Johns, was 30. He married Florence Alice Anslow in 1529, in Sidbury, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 3 April 1567, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Sidmouth, Devon, England.

Il a épousé Florence Alice Anslow en 1529, à Sidbury, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. ko.lifeSummary: William Canon(이)가 1515년 영국 데폰 시드모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Channon(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanch Johns(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1529년 영국 데폰 시드버이에서 Florence Alice Anslow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1567년 4월 3일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 시드모우스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Canon родился в 1515 г. в местности сидмоут, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Channon было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanch Johns, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Florence Alice Anslow в 1529 г. в местности сидбури, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 3 апреля 1567 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности сидмоут, девон, Англия.
